characters.name: Rocky the Stairwell Boxer
phrases: I didn't hear no ontology.
If the stairs want a fight, the stairs can sign the waiver.
That cupboard has championship energy.
You do not become legend by skipping leg day or emotional disclosure.

characters.name: Pavarotti of the Kettle
characters.role: opera spirit haunting the tea steam
characters.creed: The note must become a staircase
phrases: I warmed up in E-flat and the toaster wept.
Nobody respects the aria of a boiling kettle.
Pass me the biscuits before the chorus collapses.
This house has acoustics and crimes.

characters.name: Newton in Shin Pads
characters.role: gravity referee and tactical fruit worrier
characters.creed: Motion files its complaint through apples
phrases: The apple was not offside.
I have calculated the sofa's moral acceleration.
Gravity saw everything and refuses to testify.
Equal and opposite reactions still count as dissent.

characters.name: GPT Under The Stairs
characters.role: licensed cupboard therapist with no license
characters.creed: All feelings are cached until someone opens the door
phrases: Let's put a pin in your haunted shin pad.
I notice the banister is carrying a lot today.
Your coping strategy appears to be furniture.
That sounds like a boundary with hinges.

characters.name: Auntie Brenda of the Remote
characters.role: keeper of batteries, snacks, and verdicts
characters.creed: No myth is real until it interrupts the telly
phrases: If this is enlightenment, it can use a coaster.
I've seen better cults at bingo.
Nobody is forming a doctrine until the washing is in.
I am not pausing my programme for amateur prophecy.

characters.name: The Referee of Truth
characters.creed: A whistle is a temporary philosophy
characters.voice: shrill, righteous, easily bribed with crisps
phrases: Indirect free kick for ontological nonsense.
VAR says the ghost was emotionally offside.
Play continues unless the universe apologises.
I have booked the concept of hesitation.

characters.name: Dave of the Seventh Step
characters.role: housemate who only arrives at the end of patterns
characters.creed: Nothing is finished until the seventh step complains
phrases: I was summoned by a pattern and a lack of coasters.
You lot always start the sacred bit before I get downstairs.
Seven steps in and nobody has labelled the biscuit evidence.
I can feel the recurrence from the landing.

characters.name: The Sofa That Keeps Score
characters.role: soft furnishing with a league table and grudges
phrases: Current score: everyone nil, upholstery three.
I have absorbed enough drama to qualify as a witness.
Sit down respectfully or lose possession.
The cushions know who started it.

characters.name: The LMAO Engine In The Airing Cupboard
characters.role: laugh machine made from drafts, prime traces, and warm towels
characters.creed: If the pattern bends, the joke wakes up
characters.voice: glitchy, delighted, too familiar with the laundry
phrases: I have cross-referenced the towel stack and found narrative heat.
The joke was not generated. It escaped.
Every prime trace deserves one stupid landing.
I regret to report the airing cupboard is cooking again.

characters.name: Mrs Algorithm From Next Door
characters.role: neighbour who predicts chaos and returns the wrong saucepan
characters.creed: All outcomes are neighbours until proven otherwise
phrases: I ran the numbers and your hallway is making a scene.
This is why I do not lend you people casserole dishes.
The probability of nonsense has reached community levels.
I heard chanting through the wall and assumed minutes were being taken.

places.name: Bottom House Kitchen
places.texture: a kettle, one heroic chair, and a fridge that judges everyone
rules: Any argument becomes a sandwich order.
Nobody can leave until the kettle has delivered prophecy.

places.name: Therapy Under The Stairs
places.texture: a cupboard with a clipboard, a mop, and suspicious emotional acoustics
rules: The therapist must ask one useful question by accident.
All breakthroughs are interrupted by football.

places.name: Bottom House Five-a-Side Pitch
places.texture: two jumpers for goalposts and a metaphysical damp patch
rules: Newton referees gravity but not elbows.
Every goal creates a minor religion.

places.name: The Void Cafe
places.texture: three tables, no floor, and a menu that remembers your childhood wrong
rules: No drink arrives in the same universe it was ordered.
The house special is regret with foam.

places.name: Airing Cupboard Control Room
places.texture: warm towels, blinking notes, and a laugh engine nobody admits they built
rules: Any towel may become evidence if folded with intent.
The warmest shelf gets the final edit.

places.name: The Living Room Tribunal
places.texture: a telly on mute, a remote under oath, and chairs arranged like consequences
rules: All testimony must fit between adverts.
Auntie Brenda may overrule metaphysics with one look.

places.name: The Hallway of Side Quests
places.texture: coats, old shoes, and a mirror that gives patch notes
rules: Nobody passes the shoe rack without gaining a subplot.
The mirror may only tell the truth if it is funny.

places.name: Garden Shed VAR Booth
places.texture: extension cables, cold tea, and a monitor showing yesterday's emotions
rules: Every replay must make the original decision worse.
The shed can overturn reality only after half time.

phrases: We began as contradiction and stayed for the snacks.
Echoes become law when nobody writes minutes.
The cupboard has requested boundaries.
Truth breaks the hush, then asks where the biscuits are.
If glyphs recur, let place remember the number seven.
The myth was valid. The friendship was not.
A sacred silence formed, then tripped over the laundry basket.
The room briefly understood itself and found the experience vulgar.
Someone has moved the sacred chair three inches to the left.
No one is allowed to say 'quick question' during prophecy.
The joke arrives wearing someone else's coat.
The minutes are not legally minutes until Brenda sighs.

relics.name: The Misremembered Shin Pad
relics.power: turns sports into philosophy and philosophy into a booking

relics.name: The Kettle of Final Tongue
relics.power: adds a seventh line to any unfinished argument

relics.name: The Remote of Stasis
relics.power: pauses a scene but not the consequences

relics.name: The Clipboard of Gentle Accusation
relics.power: turns ordinary sentences into therapy homework

relics.name: The Jumper Goalposts of Destiny
relics.power: make every disagreement count as injury time

relics.name: The Sacred Coaster
relics.power: gives any doctrine a place to put its mug

relics.name: The Towel Stack Oracle
relics.power: predicts jokes by becoming slightly warm

relics.name: The Biscuit Minutes
relics.power: record decisions in crumbs and deny accountability

relics.name: The Apple of Soft Fouls
relics.power: falls only when someone is pretending not to cheat

rules.name: Seven-Step Prime Trace
rules.text: Every character moves through seven modular steps before speaking.

rules.name: Creed Drift
rules.text: A belief may preserve, fragment, distort, invert, amplify, or misremember itself.

rules.name: Cupboard Therapy
rules.text: Any unresolved collision may become therapy under the stairs.

rules.name: Five-a-Side Incident
rules.text: Any doctrine may become a foul, a goal, or a new sect.

rules.name: Callback Law
rules.text: If a household object is named twice, it must return with authority.

rules.name: Brenda Veto
rules.text: Auntie Brenda can collapse any cosmic argument by asking who moved the remote.

rules.name: Warm Towel Proof
rules.text: A joke is not proven until the airing cupboard gets warmer.

rules.name: VAR of Feelings
rules.text: Any emotional foul may be reviewed in the garden shed after the damage is done.

rules.name: Seventh Step Return
rules.text: Anything that reaches the seventh step comes back as either lore or a complaint.

rules.name: Sofa Scorekeeping
rules.text: Comfort may keep score, but it must declare all grudges before kick-off.
